bug.description: power control error causing incorrect transmit power level

prompt:
There is a power control error causing incorrect transmit power level downstream of function unpack_preamble_pdu_rel8_value in the nfapi/open-nFAPI/nfapi subsystem.
The function is located at nfapi/open-nFAPI/nfapi/src/nfapi_p7.c:4991.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
